calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Cross-Defendant Jivko Kerezov, Only.
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857
Monte S. Travis, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Gateway Bank, who was present at today's hearing.
No appearance by defendant ALC Investment Group, Inc.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Monte S. Travis, and against the Defaulted Defendant ALC Investment Group, Inc. as follows:
DAMAGES $74,233.66; COSTS $149.77 TOTALLING $74,383.43

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
